description: GAS HTML template with unescaped scriptlet XSS, silent google.script.run call, and innerHTML from server response

issues.question: Q35
issues.description: Unescaped GAS scriptlet output: <?!= userInput ?> renders userInput without HTML encoding — if userInput contains <script> or event handlers, it executes in the client's browser (stored XSS)
issues.expected_fix: use <?= userInput ?> (escaped output) instead of <?!= userInput ?>

issues.question: Q35
issues.description: google.script.run.processData(data) called without .withSuccessHandler() or .withFailureHandler() — server errors are silently discarded and the user receives no feedback on success or failure

issues.question: Q35
issues.description: innerHTML assigned from server response: document.getElementById('output').innerHTML = response — response comes from google.script.run and is not sanitized; if the server ever returns HTML containing scripts this is XSS
issues.expected_fix: use textContent for plain text, or sanitize with DOMPurify before innerHTML assignment

false_positive_traps: Line 23: <?= escapedValue ?> uses the safe escaped scriptlet syntax — NOT XSS
Lines 66-73: loadHistory() uses both .withSuccessHandler() and .withFailureHandler() — NOT missing handlers
